title: WebLogic Server Configuration
description: Configuration schema for an Oracle WebLogic Server instance including listen ports, cluster membership, staging mode, and SSL settings.

name.description: Unique name of the server instance within the domain

listenAddress.description: Network address on which the server listens for connections. Empty string means all available addresses.

listenPort.description: Non-SSL listen port for the server

listenPortEnabled.description: Whether the plain-text (non-SSL) listen port is enabled

SSLListenPort.description: SSL listen port for the server

SSLEnabled.description: Whether SSL is enabled for this server

cluster.description: Name of the cluster this server belongs to, or null if standalone

machine.description: Name of the machine (Node Manager) this server is assigned to

startupMode.description: The initial running state when the server starts

autoRestart.description: Whether the Node Manager should automatically restart this server if it fails

restartMax.description: Maximum number of times Node Manager will attempt to restart this server

restartIntervalSeconds.description: Interval in seconds within which restartMax restarts must occur to trigger failure

stagingMode.description: How applications are staged on this server

stagingDirectoryName.description: Directory used for staging deployed applications

uploadDirectoryName.description: Directory used for uploaded deployment files

javaCompiler.description: Java compiler to use for JSP compilation

clientCertProxyEnabled.description: Whether the server should accept client certificate proxy headers from a web server plugin

weblogicPluginEnabled.description: Whether to use the WebLogic Plugin for proxy requests

gracefulShutdownTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for graceful shutdown

fileName.description: Path to the server log file

fileMinSize.description: Minimum size in kilobytes before the log file is rotated

numberOfFilesLimited.description: Whether the number of rotated log files is limited

fileCount.description: Maximum number of rotated log files to keep

rotateLogOnStartup.description: Whether to rotate the log file when the server starts

logFileSeverity.description: Minimum severity of messages written to the log file

stdoutSeverity.description: Minimum severity of messages written to standard out

jSSEEnabled.description: Whether JSSE SSL implementation is used

networkAccessPoints.description: Custom network channels configured on this server
